title: Folded export promotion gate
question: Should the H122 regenerated folded export replace the maintained review snapshot now?
findings: Patch bodies are useful: the folded export applies cleanly and contains no allwinner,pinmux.
The generated cover letter is not usable: it still contains *** SUBJECT HERE *** and *** BLURB HERE *** placeholders.

The regenerated order is bindings/arm, bindings/mmc, SoC DTSI, board DTS, while the maintained snapshot currently documents a different order. That is acceptable only after refreshing the cover letter and README together.
decision: Do not promote the folded export into the maintained patches directory yet. Keep H122 as proof that regeneration works, then refresh the cover letter/base/order intentionally before replacing the snapshot.
next_action: Prepare a real cover letter for the folded order, update patches/README, then replace patches/ only after another apply-check passes.
